text.message: Yeah this has been a tough start
Oj you gotta build a road
I can give you wheat man
U or black takes next orbit
Yeah black u gotta take road not army
U can’t take army from me
Well red wins next turn so…
tf am i gonna do bout that?
Why not go for army black?
I don't have wood and you guys keep blocking my brick
Oj you gotta put the robber back on red now
